title: penstemon breviflorus var. carinatus
intro: Penstemon breviflorus var. carinatus, also known as a variety of the short-flowered beardtongue, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the plantain family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Penstemon breviflorus var. carinatus include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and combat infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
